info.title: Clearstream API
info.description: Clearstream is a church text messaging platform that enables organizations to communicate with their communities via SMS and MMS. The API provides endpoints for managing subscribers, lists, tags, messages, threads, keywords, workflows, media, and account statistics.

mobile_number.description: Subscriber mobile number in E.164 format

parameters.name: created_at
parameters.description: Filter by creation date (supports comparison operators)

parameters.name: updated_at
parameters.description: Filter by update date (supports comparison operators)

lists.description: Array of list IDs to add subscriber to

tags.description: Array of tag IDs to assign

overwrite_attributes.description: Whether to overwrite existing subscriber attributes

post.description: Create or update up to 1,000 subscribers per request. Processed asynchronously.

mobile_numbers.description: Array of mobile numbers in E.164 format

number.description: Phone number to associate with keyword

mobile_number.description: Subscriber mobile number in E.164 format

parameters.name: sent_after
parameters.description: Filter messages sent after this date

parameters.name: sent_before
parameters.description: Filter messages sent before this date

media_id.description: ID of uploaded media to attach

subscribers.description: Individual subscriber numbers to send to

mobile_number.description: Subscriber mobile number in E.164 format

post.summary: Send a reply in a thread
post.description: Send a reply in a thread

to.description: Recipient mobile number(s) in E.164 format

text_header.description: Text header (required unless using longcode/shortcode or use_default_header)

post.description: Upload a JPEG or PNG image (max 8MB) for use in MMS messages.

get.summary: Get incoming and outgoing text statistics
get.description: Get incoming and outgoing text statistics

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Obtain from your Clearstream account settings.

count.description: Number of items in current page

Unauthorized.description: Authentication failed - invalid or missing API key

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found

UnprocessableEntity.description: Validation error - the request could not be processed
